message:
Command `# Wait - the grep earlier showed 100 amuxbus references, now 0 after the script?
# The script found 0 to remove but reports 0 remaining. Let me check what happened
grep -c "amuxbus" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v
echo "---"
# Check: were those amuxbus lines NOT inout/input/output declarations?
grep "amuxbus" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5` executed with exit code 0.
